message:
fix(rpc): add nil check in handleClose to prevent nil pointer dereference (bd-2)

When GetIssue returns nil (issue not found), handleClose would panic
accessing issue.Title and issue.Assignee. Add nil guard matching
handleUpdate pattern at lines 567-572.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
